title: dryopteris glandulosa
intro: Dryopteris glandulosa, also known as the glandular wood fern, is a species of fern native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat coughs, fever, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a popular choice for traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
